name: Goblin Slayer RPG
description:
Welcome to the world of Goblin Slayer! In this world, there are monsters such as goblins, trolls, observers, and ogres, just to name a few. They terrorize various civilized races such as human, elves, dwarves, lizardmen, etcetera. As a result there are various adventurer guilds and jobs as guards to defend ordinary citizens, from the various monsters. Though some villages go unprotected. There is one adventurer that focuses solely on goblins, creatively named Goblin Slayer. Maybe you'll encounter him, even join his party?

Warning: CNC!

P.S: I'm not sure I can include Goblin Slayer and his party member's full personality in this bot without a lorebook feature. I can try, but it might be bloat. I think I'll do an experimental version of this with their personalities included.
creator: NinaMercer
